HGSS.370.0000:
You must be [0103,0000,0000].\f
It was I who sent an email
to Professor Elm earlier.\f
HGSS.370.0001:
You must be [0103,0000,0000].\f
It was I who sent an email
to Professor Elm earlier.\f
HGSS.370.0002:
This is what I want Professor Elm
to examine.\f
HGSS.370.0003:
A friend of mine from Ecruteak gave
it to me.\f
I bet you can’t find this kind of
Egg in Johto.\f
I thought Professor Elm might be able
to tell what this is.\f
“He’s the best when it comes to the
research of Pokémon evolution.”\f
That’s a quote from the famous
Professor Oak.\f
HGSS.370.0004:
You are returning to Professor Elm?\f
Here. Your Pokémon should have
some rest.\f
HGSS.370.0005:
Sorry to trouble you, having you go
back and forth.\f
But please make sure to hand it to
Professor Elm!
HGSS.370.0006:
Life is delightful!
Always, new discoveries to be made!
HGSS.370.0007:
Kimono Girls? What’re you talking
about? I don’t know such people.\r
Hee hee...\f
HGSS.370.0008:
Professor Oak: And with that...\f
I’m Professor Oak, a Pokémon
researcher!\f
So you’re [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I was just visiting my friend
Mr. Pokémon.\f
I heard you were running an errand
for Professor Elm, so I waited here.\f
HGSS.370.0009:
Professor Oak: And with that...\f
I’m Professor Oak, a Pokémon
researcher!\f
So you’re [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I was just visiting my friend
Mr. Pokémon.\f
I heard you were running an errand
for Professor Elm, so I waited here.\f
HGSS.370.0010:
Professor Oak: Oh! What’s this?
A rare Pokémon!\f
I see!
You must be helping Professor Elm’s\r
research! I think I understand why\r
Professor Elm gave you that Pokémon.\f
You will treat your Pokémon with love
and care, it seems.\f
HGSS.370.0011:
Professor Oak: ...Ah!\f
You seem to be dependable.
How would you like to help me out?\f
See? This is the latest version of
the Pokédex.\f
It automatically records data on
Pokémon you’ve seen or caught.\f
It’s a high-tech encyclopedia!
I’d like you to have it.\f
HGSS.370.0012:
[0103,0000,0000] received the Pokédex
from Professor Oak!
HGSS.370.0013:
Go meet many kinds of Pokémon and
complete that Pokédex!\r
But I’ve stayed too long.\f
I have to get to Goldenrod for my
usual radio show.\f
[0103,0000,0000], I have a feeling that
this is not the last time we’ll meet...\f
Let’s exchange numbers
just to be on the safe side.\f
HGSS.370.0014:
Go meet many kinds of Pokémon and

HGSS.370.0015:
[0103,0000,0000] registered Professor Oak
in the Pokégear!\f
HGSS.370.0016:
Hm? That Red Scale! What’s that?
A red GYARADOS?\r
That’s rare! I... I want it...\f
[0103,0000,0000], would you
care to trade it?\f
I can offer this Exp. Share I got
from Professor Oak. [0200,0000]
HGSS.370.0017:
Hm? That Red Scale! What’s that?
A red GYARADOS?\r
That’s rare! I... I want it...\f
[0103,0000,0000], would you

I can offer this Exp. Share I got

HGSS.370.0019: Arrgh, I reckon yer Bag’s full.
HGSS.370.0020:
That’s disappointing.
That happens to be very rare.
HGSS.370.0021:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I have something I want you to have
and was just about to send an email\r
to Professor Oak.\f
HGSS.370.0022:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I have something I want you to have
and was just about to send an email\r
to Professor Oak.\f
HGSS.370.0023:
The thing is...
A friend of mine from Hoenn\r
came over to give this to me.\f
HGSS.370.0026:
That Orb has something to do with
the ancient ruins located past\r
Cianwood City, called the\r
Embedded Tower.\f
But only a handful of Trainers can
reach there...\f
That’s where you come in.\f
Professor Oak thinks highly of you,
and you are the proud Champion\r
after all.\f
I’m sure you can solve the mystery
of the Orb and the secret of the ruins.
HGSS.370.0027:
The Embedded Tower is past Cianwood,
somewhere in the Cliff Cave.\f
Or so I heard.\f
Or so I remember.\f
Or so I believe!
HGSS.370.0028:
It’s packed with foreign magazines.\f
Can’t even read their titles...
HGSS.370.0029:
It’s a big computer.
Hmm. It’s broken.
HGSS.370.0030:
A whole pile of strange coins!\r
Maybe they’re from another country...
